scripts.trace:latest: mastra api --url http://localhost:4111 trace list '{"page":0,"perPage":5}' | jq '.data[] | {traceId: .traceId[:16], name, entityId, duration: ((.endedAt[:19] + "Z" | fromdate) - (.startedAt[:19] + "Z" | fromdate))}'
scripts.trace:tools: for tid in $(mastra api --url http://localhost:4111 trace list '{"page":0,"perPage":10}' | jq -r '.data[].traceId'); do tools=$(mastra api --url http://localhost:4111 trace get "$tid" | jq '[.data.spans[] | select(.spanType | IN("mcp_tool_call","tool_call")) | {name: .name, type: .spanType}]'); count=$(echo "$tools" | jq 'length'); if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then echo "== ${tid:0:16} ($count tools) =="; echo "$tools" | jq -c '.[]'; fi; done
